description: Stage 2 of the Corthography Press pipeline for partners — start a template-render run via the corthography CLI against previously-staged data, blocking until terminal. Wraps the corthography-press-render skill. Re-run as many times as needed while iterating on the template; data must already be staged by a prior template-query run for the same target+env.

evaluate.description: Start a template-render run for {asset} in the test environment and wait for it to reach a terminal state.

steps.name: Run template-render (test)
steps.description: Invoke the partner CLI to start a template-render run for {asset} against the test environment, blocking until the run is terminal. Reads the most recent staged data from the test environment for this target.
steps.prompt: Use the corthography-press-render skill to start a template-render run for target {asset} with --env test --wait. After the run completes, report the run_id and final status. If the run fails because no staged data exists, surface that error and suggest the partner run template-query first.

autonomy.description: Fully autonomous — render runs do not require approval. Iterate freely; nothing in this workflow touches a publishing destination.
